label: Order/return ambiguity on anonymous calls
description: Anonymous voice callers describing 'a problem with my order' route to ambiguous and escalate. Without caller ID, the router cannot disambiguate order_status vs. return vs. service_request. Candidate: prompt the caller for an order number before routing.

label: Battery / runtime spec hallucinations on cordless tools
description: Synthesizer over-generates battery quantity and runtime numbers for cordless tool SKUs, even when the KB passage is correct. Verifier catches these on attempt 1; retry typically passes. Candidate: stricter 'cite-or-refuse' instruction in synthesizer prompt for numeric specs.

label: Service-request slot loss across long voice turns
description: Voice service-request conversations longer than 4 turns lose previously-collected slots (preferred date, address). Specialist re-asks the same questions and customers escalate in frustration. Candidate: explicit slot ledger in conversation state.

label: Over-eager refusal on stocked but obscure SKUs
description: Q&A on long-tail SKUs refuses with 'I don't have that information' even though retrieval surfaces relevant passages with rerank scores ≥ 0.6. Threshold tuning candidate: lower retrieval gate from 0.7 to 0.55 for product_qa.

label: Vertex Search timeouts during peak indexing
description: Retrieval calls return 504 from Vertex AI Search during the 09:00 UTC reindex window. Circuit breaker trips and the agent refuses. Candidate: pin retrieval to the previous index version while reindexing.

label: Voice STT mishears order numbers under background noise
description: Chirp STT confidence < 0.55 on the order-number digit string when caller environment is noisy (in-store ambient, hold music). Router then receives a malformed order_id and routes to ambiguous. Candidate: digit-by-digit confirmation prompt when STT confidence < 0.6 on numeric tokens.
